title: The Warden of the Old Guard
description: Full Warden encounter with playstyle-variant dialogue. Three hundred years of guarding. Thirty-seven failed attempts. The record must be clear.

lines.speaker: Warden
lines.text: You are strong. Stronger than expected. The record does not account for this. It doesn't change anything. Step forward.

lines.speaker: Warden
lines.text: There is food in the guardhouse. I cannot leave the post. But you may rest before we begin, if you wish.

lines.speaker: Warden
lines.text: This pass has been held for three hundred years. By my count, you are the thirty-seventh party to attempt it. The other thirty-six turned back.

lines.speaker: Warden
lines.text: I am not telling you this to frighten you. I am telling you so the record is clear.

lines.speaker: Warden
lines.text: Show me what you are, and I will show you what I have left.
